Product Details
ED Rings

Bonded sealing rings developed for threaded fittings and hydraulic joints that require dependable pressure sealing.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

ED Rings

A practical sealing choice for bolts, ports, and hydraulic connectors where compact static sealing is required.

CHX ED Rings combine an elastomer sealing element with a rigid carrier to support stable compression, easier assembly, and reliable sealing under pressure.

Joint Sealing

Suitable for threaded hydraulic fittings, connectors, and pressure ports requiring reliable face sealing.

Stable Compression

The bonded structure helps control squeeze and supports more consistent installation quality.

Industrial Compatibility

Available with material options selected around oil resistance, temperature, and media compatibility.
